cElementTree)
ElementTreec
tostr)
B/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/fontTools/svgLib/path/__init__.py
<listcomp>
SVGPathr	
 Parse SVG ``path`` elements from a file or string, and draw them
    onto a glyph object that supports the FontTools Pen protocol.
    For example, reading from an SVG file and drawing to a Defcon Glyph:
        import defcon
        glyph = defcon.Glyph()
        pen = glyph.getPen()
        svg = SVGPath("path/to/a.svg")
        svg.draw(pen)
    Or reading from a string containing SVG data, using the alternative
    'frombytes' (a class method):
        data = '<?xml version="1.0" ...'
        svg = SVGPath.frombytes(data)
        svg.draw(pen)
    Both constructors can optionally take a 'transform' matrix (6-float
    tuple, or a FontTools Transform object) to modify the draw output.
    Nc
root
parseZ
getroot
	transform)
self
filenamer
treer
__init__(
SVGPath.__init__c
	frombytesr
datar
SVGPath.frombytesc
Nz'.//{http://www.w3.org/2000/svg}path[@d]
findallr	
get)
penZ
draw6
SVGPath.draw)

fontTools.misc.py23Z
fontTools.pens.transformPenr
parserr	
Z	xml.etreer
